steps: Create a temp git repo with one committed file
Run review-diff with no arguments
Assert exit code is 0 and stdout is empty

description: 0-arg, modified tracked file: stdout contains the diff hunk
steps: Create a temp git repo with one committed file
Modify the tracked file without staging
Run review-diff with no arguments
Assert stdout contains a diff --git line and the modified hunk

description: 0-arg, untracked file: stdout contains a new-file diff block
steps: Create a temp git repo with one committed file
Create a new untracked file
Run review-diff with no arguments
Assert stdout contains 'new file mode' and a diff --git line for the untracked file

description: 0-arg, staged file: stdout contains the staged hunk
steps: Create a temp git repo with one committed file
Modify and stage a file via git add
Run review-diff with no arguments
Assert stdout contains a diff --git line and the staged hunk

description: 1-arg branch, self-review: stdout contains the feature commit and a diff --git line
steps: Create a temp git repo on main with one commit
Create a feature branch, add a commit with a file change
Run review-diff <feature-branch> from the feature branch
Assert stdout contains the feature commit message and a diff --git line

description: 1-arg branch, external review: stdout contains the feature commit; main-only commits absent
steps: Create a temp git repo on main with one commit
Create a feature branch, add a commit with a file change
Switch back to main, add a main-only commit
Run review-diff <feature-branch> from main
Assert stdout contains the feature commit and a diff --git line; assert main-only commit message is absent

description: 1-arg commit SHA: stdout contains the commit message and a diff --git line
steps: Create a temp git repo with two commits
Capture the SHA of the first commit
Run review-diff <sha>
Assert stdout contains the commit message for that SHA and a diff --git line

description: 2-arg range: stdout contains commits and a diff --git line scoped to the range
steps: Create a temp git repo on main with two commits (A, B)
Create a feature branch off A, add commit C
Run review-diff <sha-of-A> <feature-branch>
Assert stdout contains commit C and a diff --git line; assert commit B is absent
